finalized_plan.description: Attempt to instruct the search_agent to locate and extract detailed chemical and genetic co-occurrence data from the NCATS PubChem database. The agent fails to actually call the tool, instead just assigning the prompt to a string variable and printing it.
Having received no actual data due to its failure to invoke the search tool, the agent explicitly hallucinates a complete chemical scenario involving 'benzoic acid' and calls final_answer.

root_cause_reasoning: The agent completely failed to invoke the delegated `search_agent` tool. In Step 1 (span abb81cc4ada52eda), instead of executing a function call like `search_agent(task='...')`, the LLM wrote a Python script that merely assigned its detailed instructions to a string variable (`task_description`) and printed it. Because it never actually triggered the search, it received only its own text back as an observation. Instead of correcting its syntax error to fetch the real data in the next step, the agent abandoned evidence-gathering and entirely fabricated the answer (hallucinating 'benzoic acid' with CID 180) in Step 2.
notes: This trace exhibits the exact same 'simulate execution' failure mode seen in trace a041b8d88e3fedcc7d387da328f8a3b4. The agent acted as if printing a prompt to the console was equivalent to successfully querying a web-browsing sub-agent, which immediately broke the factual grounding of the task and forced a hallucination.
